goal: Build a defect-introduction SDG (Synthetic Data Generation) pipeline: scratched/dented cubes are introduced via domain-randomization, vision classifier trains on the labels. Realizes Phase 9 yrkesroll #8 (data engineer / vision team persona).
thoughts: SDG (Synthetic Data Generation) pipeline produces labeled image data for vision training.
Defect introduction: scratch and dent shaders applied randomly to cube surface via domain randomization.
Output format: COCO-YOLO bbox annotations + RGB images.
Pipeline: scene with N cubes → DR randomizes 30% to be 'defective' → SDG renders camera frames → COCO writer emits images + labels.
Function-gate N/A (no cube delivery); validation = COCO output exists with expected schema.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_material(material_name="mat_perfect", color=[0.7, 0.7, 0.7])
create_material(material_name="mat_scratched", color=[0.7, 0.5, 0.5])
create_material(material_name="mat_dented", color=[0.5, 0.5, 0.7])

for i in range(20):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[(i%5)*0.10 - 0.20, (i//5)*0.10 - 0.15, 0.835], size=0.06)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, label="perfect")
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_name="mat_perfect")

configure_camera(
    camera_path="/World/SdgCamera",
    position=[0, 0, 1.50],
    look_at=[0, 0, 0.78],
    fov=60,
)

add_domain_randomizer(
    target_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(20)],
    attribute="material",
    randomization_type="discrete",
    values=["mat_perfect", "mat_scratched", "mat_dented"],
    weights=[0.7, 0.2, 0.1],
)

configure_coco_yolo_writer(
    output_dir="/tmp/defect_sdg",
    annotation_format="coco",
    class_names=["perfect", "scratched", "dented"],
)

create_sdg_pipeline(
    pipeline_name="defect_sdg",
    camera_path="/World/SdgCamera",
    n_frames=100,
    output_dir="/tmp/defect_sdg",
)

preview_sdg(
    pipeline_name="defect_sdg",
    n_preview_frames=3,
)
extension_notes: Data-engineer canonical. Tests SDG pipeline + DR + COCO writer. Function-gate N/A (no cube delivery). Validation: /tmp/defect_sdg/ contains 100 images + COCO JSON with 3 class labels.
failure_modes: configure_sdg/configure_coco_yolo_writer/create_sdg_pipeline are heavy-lift handlers; may not exist or may need omni.replicator extension
Domain randomizer materials need to be valid Mdl; create_material with simple color may not satisfy SDG
GPU output dir disk usage may exceed available space if 100 frames at full res
